title_en: Dark Chocolate vs. Candy Bars: The Sweet Truth
title_es: Chocolate Oscuro vs. Barras de Dulce: La Dulce Verdad
hook_en: Dark chocolate or candy bar? Let's break it down!
hook_es: ¿Chocolate oscuro o barra de dulce? ¡Vamos a desglosarlo!
key_message: Dark chocolate with 70%+ cacao is a healthier choice over processed candy bars filled with additives like TBHQ.
_source_food_context: • HEALTHY: Dark chocolate (70%+ cacao, cocoa butter) vs. PROCESSED: Milk chocolate candy bars (sugar, PGPR, TBHQ, artificial vanilla) — TBHQ is a petroleum-derived preservative banned in some countries

hook_en: Surprise: Not all chocolate is created equal!
hook_es: Sorpresa: ¡No todo el chocolate es igual!
key_message: While dark chocolate can be a nutritious treat, many candy bars contain harmful additives banned in other countries.
_source_food_context: • HEALTHY: Dark chocolate (70%+ cacao, cocoa butter) vs. PROCESSED: Milk chocolate candy bars (sugar, PGPR, TBHQ, artificial vanilla) — TBHQ is a petroleum-derived preservative banned in some countries
